drl:
rule "R0"
when

    $a0_1 : ArrayList() from collect( T0(f1 != true) )
then
end
rule "R1"
agenda-group "ga"
when
    T0(f1 == false, f1 == false, $b1_0_0 : f0)

rule "R2"
agenda-group "ga"
when
    $p2_0 : T0(f0 >= "b", f1 == true, $b2_0_0 : f0, $b2_0_1 : f1, f1 == false)

    modify($p2_0) { setF1(true), setF0($p2_0.getF0()) }

    $p3_0 : T0($b3_0_0 : f0, $b3_0_1 : f1, f1 == false)

rule "R4"

    $p4_0 : T0(f0 != "b", f0 in ("zz", "ab"), $b4_0_0 : f1, $b4_0_1 : f0)

    insertLogical(new T1("alpha", $p4_0.isF1()));
